diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -48,19 +48,25 @@
         x = x + self.mean

         return x

 

-class LinearModel(nn.Module):

+class MLPModel(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, seq_len, pred_len, channels):

-        super(LinearModel, self).__init__()

+        super(MLPModel, self).__init__()

         self.revin = RevIN(channels)

         self.linear = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

+        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(seq_len, 256),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(256, pred_len)

+        )

 

     def forward(self, x):

         x = self.revin(x, 'norm')

         x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)

-        x = self.linear(x)

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)

-        x = self.revin(x, 'denorm')

-        return x

+        out = self.linear(x) + self.mlp(x)

+        out = out.permute(0, 2, 1)

+        out = self.revin(out, 'denorm')

+        return out

 

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

@@ -77,7 +83,7 @@

     device = torch.device("cpu")

-    model = LinearModel(96, 720, 7).to(device)

+    model = MLPModel(96, 720, 7).to(device)

--- a/train.py

@@ -64,19 +64,25 @@
         x = x + self.mean

         return x

 

-class LinearModel(nn.Module):

+class MLPModel(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, seq_len, pred_len, channels):

-        super(LinearModel, self).__init__()

+        super(MLPModel, self).__init__()

         self.revin = RevIN(channels)

         self.linear = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

+        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(seq_len, 256),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(256, pred_len)

+        )

 

     def forward(self, x):

         x = self.revin(x, 'norm')

         x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)

-        x = self.linear(x)

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)

-        x = self.revin(x, 'denorm')

-        return x

+        out = self.linear(x) + self.mlp(x)

+        out = out.permute(0, 2, 1)

+        out = self.revin(out, 'denorm')

+        return out
